propositions: Selects the front Autosubmit+submittable change/chain using FIFO ordering keyed on the Autosubmit vote's ApprovalInfo.date, oldest-voted-submittable first.
Routes a >1-member non-merge relation chain to rebase:chain, a --no-ff merge change always to rebase (first-parent-only), and a single non-merge change to rebase.
rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader=true preserves the human uploader plus DCO Signed-off-by/rebar-ticket trailers and drops Verified so CI re-runs.
The Gerrit helper reuses this repo's stdlib-only urllib+Basic-auth+XSSI pattern authenticating as RebarBotNava, without pygerrit2 or a src/rebar import.
Unit tests cover FIFO ordering and merge-vs-chain-vs-single routing against recorded Gerrit JSON.
A live check exercised single-change rebase-on-behalf-of-uploader end-to-end; the multi-member rebase:chain live E2E remains a deferred follow-up.
